description_long: This is a standard 330ml Pepsi can, featuring a cylindrical aluminum body with a slightly domed top and bottom. The can is predominantly blue, with the iconic Pepsi logo—a red, white, and blue sphere—prominently displayed on the front, accompanied by the word 'pepsi' in lowercase white letters. A yellow promotional band encircles the top rim, advertising a price offer. Nutritional information, barcodes, and recycling symbols are printed in white on the back and side panels. The can's surface is metallic and glossy, reflecting light and giving it a sleek appearance. The pull-tab opening mechanism is visible on the top, indicating the can is unopened and ready for use.
description: A blue Pepsi can with a glossy metallic finish, featuring the Pepsi logo, promotional pricing, and nutritional labeling.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large Pepsi logo, 'pepsi' text, and the yellow promotional band at the top.
description_view_1: Side view displaying detailed nutritional information, barcode, and recycling symbols in white text.
description_view_2: Angled view highlighting the vertical 'pepsi' text and more of the yellow promotional band.
description_view_3: Rear-side view showing the nutritional traffic light label and partial logo, with the yellow band visible.
attribute_brand_logo: A large Pepsi logo (red, white, and blue sphere) is visible on the front, with 'pepsi' in white lowercase letters below it.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: Nutritional information and a traffic light label are visible on the side and rear of the can, including calories and ingredients.
attribute_promotional_graphics: A yellow promotional band at the top advertises '69p or 2 FOR £1.20'.
